changelog: Security fixes: rotated leaked VAPID private key (new public key in push-notifications.js, private key removed from VAPID_KEYS.md and moved to gitignored VAPID_PRIVATE_KEY.local.md); added send-push Supabase Edge Function + push_subscriptions table so Web Push actually delivers; pattern-lock.js now stores admin pattern, security-question answer, and backup PIN as salted SHA-256 hashes instead of plaintext in localStorage (with legacy plaintext migration on first successful login/recovery); package.json version synced to version.json (4.9.10).
